---
name: Bug report
about: A skill produced wrong output, failed to load, or behaved unexpectedly.
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Which skill?

- Skill name: `<skill-name>` (e.g. `literature-triage-matrix`)
- Source repo: `WenyuChiou/<repo-name>`
- Install method: marketplace / git clone / pip / other

## What did you ask Claude to do?

```
<paste the prompt or describe the request>
```

## What happened?

<paste the output or describe the unexpected behavior>

## What did you expect?

<one or two sentences>

## Environment

- Claude Code version: `claude --version`
- OS:
- Did the prerequisite check fire? (yes / no / N/A)

## Reproduction

If possible, paste the minimum file set / commands to reproduce.
